title: BnC Coaster Compat
description: Adds some mod item compatibility for Brewin and Chewin's coasters!
body:
# Adds some mod compatibility for Brewin and Chewin's item coasters!

![current lineup (v3)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f870896f8bf1afa92c727296f7415e84e114d3b5.png)

# Current compatibility list includes:
### Minecraft:
- spider eye/fermented spider eye (dont ask why)
- baked potato
### Brewin and Chewin:
- ham and cheese sandwich
- overwrites sweet/glow berries
- overwrites cookies to be bigger
### Neapolitan:
- all ice cream flavors
- banana bread
- strawberries
- white strawberries
### Respiteful:
- all ice cream flavors
### Farmer's Respite:
- green tea cookie
### Collector's Reap:
- all ice cream flavors
- land and sea burger
- lime
- lime slice
- lime cookie
- pomegranate
- pomegranate slice
### Atmospheric:
- orange/blood orange
- orange pudding
- orange sorbet
- passion fruit
- passion fruit sorbet
- passion fruit tart
- shimmering passion fruit
- currant
- currant muffin
- yucca fruit
- roasted yucca fruit
### Farmer's Delight:
- egg sandwich
- chicken sandwich
- bacon sandwich
- hamburger
- dumplings
- ham
- smoked ham
- stuffed potato
### Upgrade Aquatic:
- mulberry
- mulberry bread
- mulberry jam bottle
- replaces mulberry jam bottle textures
### Abnormal's Delight:
- cherry cookie
- mulberry cookie
- maple cookie
### My Nether's Delight:
- hot dog
- chili dog
### Haunted Harvest:
- cornbread
- rotten apple
### Autumnity:
- foul berries
- pumpkin bread
### Environmental:
- cherries
### Quark:
- ancient fruit
### Caverns and Chasms:
- bejeweled apple
### Supplementaries:
- candy
### Buzzier bees:
- honey bread
### Incubation:
- scrambled eggs
### Create:
- sweet roll
